general_theorem_summary.away_from_vertex: Cone without vertex has curvature sign 0 exactly when base has corresponding curvature sign 1 locally.
general_theorem_summary.curvature_ge_0_at_vertex: Requires a connected base with curvature >= 1 in the large and no triangle perimeter above 2pi, apart from the two-point line case.
general_theorem_summary.curvature_le_0_at_vertex: Requires the base to have curvature <= 1 in the large, componentwise if disconnected.
